display_information.name: Kala
display_information.description: AI teammate for arts and culture nonprofits. Finds real grants, tracks artist engagements, manages RSVPs, and handles the admin.
display_information.long_description:
Kala helps small arts and culture nonprofits get more done without adding headcount. Here is what it can do:

🌱 Find funding — search real, open U.S. federal arts and culture grants that fit your mission and budget, and track the nonfederal match many arts grants require.
📝 Do the writing — draft impact reports, donor thank-yous, and volunteer shift announcements from a few quick notes, then post them straight to a channel.
⏰ Keep track — remember a deadline and nudge your team in Slack before it is due.
🗒️ Catch up fast — turn messy meeting notes into a clean summary with decisions and action items.
🔎 Stay grounded — search your team’s past messages and files so answers reflect what people actually said.

Kala is built for arts and culture organizations — performing arts groups, museums, galleries, and community arts and cultural institutions — with funding, reports, and metrics tailored to that work. And it works in any language — write to it however you are comfortable, and it replies the same way.

agent_view.agent_description: Kala is a teammate for arts and culture nonprofit staff who wear ten hats and never have enough hours. Tell it what you need — arts grants to chase, a report due, a donor to thank — and it finds the answer or writes the first draft in seconds, in whatever language you write in.

suggested_prompts.title: Find arts funding
suggested_prompts.message: Find arts and culture grants that fit our mission and budget

suggested_prompts.title: Draft a report
suggested_prompts.message: Draft an impact report from a few notes about our season

suggested_prompts.title: Thank a donor
suggested_prompts.message: Write a warm thank-you note for our donors

suggested_prompts.title: Track a deadline
suggested_prompts.message: Remind me about a grant deadline before it is due

slash_commands.description: Admin: view a summary of feedback ratings

shortcuts.name: Send to Kala
shortcuts.description: Summarize, find grants, draft a report, or set a reminder from this message
